title: pedicularis lanata subsp. adamsii
intro: Pedicularis lanata subsp. adamsii, also known as Adames' lousewort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Adames' lousewort include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Adames' lousewort can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
